calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2021 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-30-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. CRAIG J. ROLFE, Esq. of Freeman Mathis & Gary, LLP (Tel: 916-462-9216) for defendant Comcast of California III, Inc.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT COMCAST CORPORATION MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENED COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Comcast of California III, Inc.'s "motion to strike portions of plaintiff's first amended complaint" is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 435.5. The statute provides that if "an amended pleading is filed, the responding party shall meet and confer again with the party who filed the amended pleading before filing a motion to strike the amended pleading." (Id.) Counsel's declaration claims a meet and confer regarding plaintiff's "complaint," and not his first amended complaint. The declaration also fails to state the "means by which the moving party met and conferred with the party who filed the pleading." (Id.)

Defendant's response to the first amended complaint is now due by August 27, 2021.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-19-2021 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Raymond DiGiacomo, Plaintiff and Self-Represented Litigant, 415.595.4107;
Atty. Tim Fama. Esq. of the San Francico City Attorney's Office, 415.554.3921, for the Defendant the City and County of San Francisco.

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

The matter is called. ARGUMENT is held. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's demurrer to the first amended complaint is sustained without leave to amend.

(See Word minutes or order signed this date for the Court's complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/EPS)
